metadata.extraction_method: Best-effort extraction from uploaded PDFs/HTML/email using embedded text, regex parsing, manual normalization, and web-verified missing-paperwork entries requested by the user.
limitations: Some historical itinerary arrival/departure times were not present or not reliably extractable and are null.
Some older cruise price component splits are incomplete; total price is retained when extractable.
Onboard expenses are only present where a folio/final statement was found.
The 2024-05-18 family sailing is included from user statement plus web itinerary lookup, with financials unavailable.
The Oct 2025 travel receipt files are preserved as an unmatched document group because they did not identify a cruise.
The 2026-11-07 Mariner of the Seas cruise is a future booking sourced from the uploaded booking confirmation email; onboard expenses are unavailable until after sailing.
Birthdates, card numbers, and other sensitive payment details were intentionally omitted from the JSON export.

notes: User stated this sailing existed and was similar to the 2024-09-07 sailing. Itinerary is based on Royal Caribbean/third-party itinerary pattern for Mariner 5-night Western Caribbean from Galveston: Galveston, sea day, Costa Maya, Cozumel, sea day, Galveston. Financials unavailable.
